title: Understanding Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments: A Plain-Language Breakdown: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a Kenyan beat maker who's been struggling to get paid for your hard work. For months, you've tried to use PayPal and Stripe to sell your beats online, but those payment processors keep blocking your account due to 'geographic restrictions' or 'KYC requirements.' It's like they don't trust you or your country. This can be frustrating, especially when you know you've got talent and a growing audience. But what if you didn't need those payment processors at all? What if you could sell your beats directly to your fans, without having to deal with all the hassle and uncertainty? It's time to learn about selling beats online with crypto payments – a game-changer for digital creators like you.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online with crypto payments is a way for you to monetize your music without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe. It's a peer-to-peer transaction, where you, the beat maker, connect directly with your fans, who pay for your beats using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin or Ethereum. This model is important because it gives you more control over your finances and allows you to reach a global audience, without being limited by geographical restrictions or KYC requirements. By using crypto payments, you can sell your beats to anyone, anywhere in the world, and get paid instantly.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind selling beats online with crypto payments involves the use of Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration plugin that allows your fans to pay for your beats using their cryptocurrency wallets. When a fan wants to buy a beat, they'll be directed to a secure payment page where they can connect their wallet and complete the transaction. Meanwhile, you'll receive a notification and get paid instantly, without having to deal with any intermediaries. This process is automated, so you can focus on creating more music, while your fans enjoy the convenience of buying your beats online.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is built for digital creators like you – beat makers, producers, and musicians who want to monetize their music online without worrying about payment processing headaches. It's perfect for those who are already using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin or Ethereum in their daily lives, or for those who are looking to expand their reach and tap into a global market. By selling your beats online with crypto payments, you can increase your earnings, build a loyal fanbase, and take your music career to the next level.
You don't need to be a tech expert to use Web3 Wallet Connect.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make selling beats online with crypto payments work together are Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration plugin, and NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. With Web3 Wallet Connect, your fans can connect their wallets and pay for your beats, while NOWPayments takes care of the payment processing and settlement. This integration allows for seamless transactions, automated delivery, and real-time analytics, making it easy for you to track your sales and earnings.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the basics of selling beats online with crypto payments, it's time to take action. Here are some concrete steps you can take to start selling your beats online today: Set up a payment page using Web3 Wallet Connect and NOWPayments. Create a digital product, like a beat pack or a music loop, that you can sell online. Promote your product on social media and to your email list. Engage with your fans and build a loyal community around your music. With these steps, you can start selling your beats online and getting paid instantly, without any hassle or uncertainty.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

What if I don't know anything about cryptocurrencies or Web3 Wallet Connect? Don't worry – you don't need to be a tech expert to use this solution. You can start selling your beats online with crypto payments right away, even if you're new to the world of cryptocurrencies. We've got resources and support in place to help you get started, so you can focus on creating more music and building your fanbase.
Selling beats online with crypto payments is a game-changer for digital creators like you.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in selling beats online with crypto payments, you might also want to learn about other digital products you can create and sell online, like music loops, presets, or even courses on music production. You can use Web3 Wallet Connect to sell these products too, and reach a global audience. By diversifying your income streams and creating multiple revenue sources, you can take your music career to the next level and achieve financial stability.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your beats online with crypto payments, follow these concrete steps: Set up a payment page using Web3 Wallet Connect and NOWPayments. Create a digital product, like a beat pack or a music loop, that you can sell online. Promote your product on social media and to your email list. Engage with your fans and build a loyal community around your music. Track your sales and earnings in real-time, using analytics tools provided by Web3 Wallet Connect. Test and iterate on your product and marketing strategy to optimize your results.
By diversifying your income streams and creating multiple revenue sources, you can take your music career to the next level.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
